title: Recipe snapshot authority foundation
summary: immutable content snapshot이 exact recipe nutrition snapshot만 pin하도록 하고 Meal direct nutrition을 expand→mirror→contract/null로 안전하게 단일화한다.
goal: recipe current 변화와 개인 soft delete 뒤에도 Meal·cooking·batch·history가 사용 당시 content와 exact nutrition authority를 재현하며 legacy rollback floor를 지키게 한다.

owners.claude: forbidden by explicit user instruction; do not invoke Claude for authoring, repair, implementation, review, security, DB, design, operations, or closeout
owners.codex: separate sessions for Stage 1 author, internal 1.5 reviewer/repair-final, backend/data implementation, security/DB review, five-axis review, existing-consumer regression review, and closeout; no session approves its own work

dependencies: existing recipe nutrition snapshot release merged
recipe-visibility-read-hardening Stage 1 docs merged as PR #1077; its runtime implementation remains a Stage 2 predecessor
product-ingredient-link-foundation Stage 1 docs merged as PR #1076 for Train B integrated QA
this Stage 1 docs sequence does not activate schema migration or Meal contract cutover

external_smokes: node scripts/verify-recipe-snapshot-authority-remote.mjs --mode post-merge-read-only from merged exact SHA only
remote table column FK unique check trigger grant and function inventory
current and immediate-previous content-aware reader compatibility smoke
one-full-release old-shape direct-only write zero and pair mismatch zero evidence
pre-contract rollback and post-contract content-aware rollback-floor rejection
private account cleanup FK-order fixture preserves owner-null public shared snapshots
Train B Storage outbox and pantry effective-ingredient integration smoke
production contract-null writes remain zero until approved compatibility gate

required_checks: pnpm exec vitest run tests/recipe-snapshot-authority.test.ts tests/recipe-snapshot-readers.test.ts tests/recipe-snapshot-security.test.ts tests/recipe-snapshot-account-delete.test.ts
verify_commands: pnpm exec vitest run tests/workflow-v2-docs.test.ts tests/omo-automation-spec.test.ts tests/omo-bookkeeping.test.ts tests/omo-doc-gate.test.ts tests/source-of-truth-sync.test.ts
evaluator_commands: separate Codex internal 1.5 review of all five Stage 1 core artifacts plus roadmap and status projections
separate Codex security and DB review of snapshot ownership immutability Meal migration rollback floor and account cleanup
separate Codex Stage 3 implementation review and final closeout review

out_of_scope: Personal recipe editor fork save update soft-delete route and impact preview owned by successors #5 and #6

Future Meal propagation replace-all keep shopping reconcile and snapshot-v2 session-attempt RPC behavior and activation owned by #7; #4 owns their dark session-meal claim and idempotency schema foundation
Cooked batch weight ledger events and exact pantry completion owned by #8
Meal log core and UI owned by #9 and #12
Planner shell Cook Mode weight UI and Recipe Detail CTA owned by #10 #11 and #5
Existing v1 sessions removal or snapshot-v2 creation activation
Duplicate nutrition vector in content Meal or batch
Relaxed nutrition FK unique current index writer conflict or immutable trigger
New public endpoint field status error or visual hierarchy
Unmerged remote migration production database or data write
notes: Roadmap moves to docs while workflow lifecycle stays planned and approval remains not_started until fresh separate Codex internal 1.5, security/DB and five-axis reviewers approve with zero required findings. Stage 1 verify_commands are current docs validators, focused workflow tests, lint, typecheck, audit and diff check only. Snapshot migration/readers/account cleanup, PostgreSQL, compatibility telemetry, consumer/E2E and remote-verifier commands are future Stage 2/4/closeout artifacts. Implementation waits for #3 runtime and the merged nutrition baseline; contract/null waits for current+previous content-aware, one-release old-shape zero and pair-mismatch zero evidence.
